summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical exists, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and job permissions disable merge, fix PRs, low-signal closeout, and instant close. Open focused PRs with failed proof remain open; ready-for-maintainer PRs need maintainer or technical correctness judgment before any mutating action.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent focused bug-fix PR; closure is not allowed and the unresolved blocker is proof/technical validation, not low-signal cleanup.

This is a useful, proof-backed public API change, but it requires maintainer compatibility judgment before any merge or close action.
The PR is focused and not low-signal, but technical correctness and failing checks require human/author follow-up outside this no-fix, no-merge job.
Keep open as an independent narrow candidate; it is not closable as low-signal and cannot be fixed or merged in this job.
